items.title: AITreasureBox
items.content: 🤖 Automatically collected AI repos, tools, websites, papers & tutorials. 实用AI百宝箱 💎

items.title: awesome-opensource-ai
items.content: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.

items.title: prompts.chat
items.content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.title: ludwig
items.content: Low-code framework for building custom LLMs, neural networks, and other AI models

items.title: ray
items.content: Ray is an AI compute engine. Ray consists of a core distributed runtime and a set of AI Libraries for accelerating ML workloads.

items.title: screenpipe
items.content: Run agents that work for you based on what you do. AI finally knows what you are doing

items.title: SwanLab
items.content: ⚡️SwanLab - an open-source, modern-design AI training tracking and visualization tool. Supports Cloud / Self-hosted use. Integrated with PyTorch / Transformers / verl / LLaMA Factory / ms-swift / Ultralytics / MMEngine / Keras etc.

items.title: AIGC-Interview-Book
items.content: 【三年面试五年模拟】AIGC算法工程师面试秘籍。涵盖AIGC、LLM大模型、AI Agent、传统深度学习、自动驾驶、机器学习、计算机视觉、自然语言处理、强化学习、大数据挖掘、具身智能、元宇宙、AGI等AI行业面试笔试干货经验与核心知识。

items.title: metaflow
items.content: Build, Manage and Deploy AI/ML Systems

items.title: mlflow
items.content: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

items.title: DocsGPT
items.content: Private AI platform for agents, assistants and enterprise search. Built-in Agent Builder, Deep research, Document analysis, Multi-model support, and API connectivity for agents.

items.title: tensorzero
items.content: TensorZero is an open-source LLMOps platform that unifies an LLM gateway, observability, evaluation, optimization, and experimentation.

items.title: agentic-context-engine
items.content: 🧠 Make your agents learn from experience. Now available as a hosted solution at kayba.ai

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.content: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

items.title: spiceai
items.content: A portable accelerated SQL query, search, and LLM-inference engine, written in Rust, for data-grounded AI apps and agents.

items.title: RAGHub
items.content: A community-driven collection of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) frameworks, projects, and resources. Contribute and explore the evolving RAG ecosystem.

items.title: pixeltable
items.content: Data Infrastructure providing a declarative, incremental approach for multimodal AI workloads.

items.title: rocketride-server
items.content: High-performance AI pipeline engine with a C++ core and 50+ Python-extensible nodes. Build, debug, and scale LLM workflows with 13+ model providers, 8+ vector databases, and agent orchestration, all from your IDE. Includes VS Code extension, TypeScript/Python SDKs, and Docker deployment.

items.title: machine-learning-interview-questions
items.content: Your Cheat Sheet for Machine Learning Interview – Questions and Answers.

items.title: flyte
items.content: Dynamic, resilient AI orchestration. Coordinate data, models, and compute as you build AI workflows. Flyte 2 now available locally: https://github.com/flyteorg/flyte-sdk
